creator: pgollucci@FreeBSD.org
text:
Backport rewrite log locking fix, requested on apache@
by Bernhard Weißhuhn <bkw@weisshuhn.de>

http://svn.apache.org/viewvc?view=revision&revision=783734 

* Remove locking for writing to the rewritelog. There seems to be no reason
  why locking is required here.
  See also: http://marc.info/?l=apache-httpd-dev&m=124282193217344&w=2

PR: 46942
Submitted by:  Dan Poirier <poirier pobox.com>
Reviewed by: rpluem
